source_text:
SoCal writers & readers: save the date for March 28 for the San Diego Writers Festival! 📚 

Stop by this free event in Coronado for panels, workshops, music, poetry, food & more. You can also attend a horror panel I’ll be on! 😈 More details soon.

#sandiego #SanDiegowriters #SanDiegoauthors #writing
